mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TAB_SUPPLIER (S_ID, S_TENANT_ID, S_NAME, S_CONTACT, S_PHONE, DT_CREATE_TIME, DT_UPDATE_TIME, S_CREATE_USER, S_UPDATE_USER) VALUES (#{sId}, #{sTenantId}, #{sName}, #{sContact}, #{sPhone}, #{dtCreateTime}, #{dtUpdateTime}, #{sCreateUser}, #{sUpdateUser})
mapper.update: UPDATE TAB_SUPPLIER SET S_NAME = #{sName}, S_CONTACT = #{sContact}, S_PHONE = #{sPhone}, DT_UPDATE_TIME = #{dtUpdateTime}, S_UPDATE_USER = #{sUpdateUser} WHERE S_ID = #{sId}
mapper.select: SELECT S_ID, S_NAME, S_CONTACT, S_PHONE, DT_CREATE_TIME, DT_UPDATE_TIME, S_CREATE_USER, S_UPDATE_USER FROM TAB_SUPPLIER WHERE S_ID = #{sId}

SELECT S_ID, S_NAME, S_CONTACT, S_PHONE, DT_CREATE_TIME, DT_UPDATE_TIME, S_CREATE_USER, S_UPDATE_USER FROM TAB_SUPPLIER
ORDER BY DT_CREATE_TIME DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TAB_PURCHASE WHERE S_SUPPLIER_ID = #{supplierId}
